---
title: "Contact"
---

::: {.content-section}

We welcome inquiries from prospective students, collaborators, and anyone interested in our research.

<div class="contact-layout">

<div class="contact-cards">

<div class="contact-card">
<div class="contact-card-icon" aria-hidden="true"><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i></div>
<div class="contact-card-body">
<h2>Principal Investigator</h2>
<p><strong>Gal Ziv, PhD</strong></p>
<p><i class="bi bi-envelope" aria-hidden="true"></i> <a href="mailto:gal.ziv@lsu.lt">gal.ziv@lsu.lt</a></p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="contact-card">
<div class="contact-card-icon" aria-hidden="true"><i class="bi bi-building"></i></div>
<div class="contact-card-body">
<h2>Lab Address</h2>
<p>LSU Skill Acquisition Lab<br>
<a href="https://www.lsu.lt/" target="_blank" aria-label="Lithuanian Sports University website (opens in new tab)">Lithuanian Sports University</a><br>
Sporto g. 6, Kaunas, Lithuania</p>
<p><i class="bi bi-envelope" aria-hidden="true"></i> <a href="mailto:lsumotorlab@gmail.com">lsumotorlab@gmail.com</a></p>
</div>
</div>

</div>

<div class="map-container contact-map">
<iframe src="https://maps.google.com/maps?q=Lithuanian+Sports+University,+Sporto+g.+6,+Kaunas,+Lithuania&output=embed" title="Map of Lithuanian Sports University location" width="100%" height="380" style="border:0;" allowfullscreen="" loading="lazy" referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade"></iframe>
</div>

</div>

:::
